# jellyfin_plugin_repository (Data Source)

Looks up a Jellyfin plugin repository by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_plugin_repository" "stable" {
  name = "Jellyfin Stable"
}

output "stable_repo_url" {
  value = data.jellyfin_plugin_repository.stable.url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The repository name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the repository is enabled.
- `url` (String) The repository URL.
